use_cases: Multi-select form fields for collecting user preferences
Product filtering interfaces with multiple criteria
Settings panels for toggling multiple options
Terms and conditions acceptance with grouped options
ai_summary: A Base UI checkbox group component that enables multi-select functionality within a labeled fieldset. Features accessible keyboard navigation with focus-visible outlines, clean minimalist flat styling in a gray color scheme, and reactive checked/unchecked states. Uses the Base UI composition pattern with Checkbox.Root and Checkbox.Indicator sub-components for flexible styling.
